# Clear Care Dental Enterprise

> Clear Care Dental Enterprise is a white-label dental benefits platform that lets employers, TPAs, health-plan administrators, DSOs, dental groups, associations, and channel partners offer modern, affordable dental coverage — with a member app, transparent pricing, concierge support, and full admin/billing tooling — without the cost and complexity of traditional dental insurance. It is the B2B arm of Clear Care Dental Group.

## What it does
- Lets partners launch and administer dental membership plans for their members, employees, or clients.
- Provides a member-facing app, online enrollment, payments, and utilization/billing reporting.
- Supports white-labeling: partners can offer the platform under their own brand.

## Who it's for
- **Employers & small business** — give employees real dental coverage, set up in days not quarters.
- **TPAs & health plan administrators** — add a turnkey dental program across client groups with the eligibility, billing, and reporting controls they expect.
- **DSOs & dental groups** — launch a branded in-house dental membership across practices to drive recurring revenue and patient loyalty.
- **Associations & member groups** — offer affordable dental coverage as a member benefit, fully managed.
- **White-label / channel partners** — resell a complete dental benefits platform under their own brand.

## Solutions
- [All solutions](https://clearcaredentalenterprise.com/solutions)
- [Employers & Small Business](https://clearcaredentalenterprise.com/solutions/employers)
- [TPAs & Health Plan Administrators](https://clearcaredentalenterprise.com/solutions/tpa)
- [DSOs & Dental Groups](https://clearcaredentalenterprise.com/solutions/dso)
- [Associations & Member Groups](https://clearcaredentalenterprise.com/solutions/associations)
- [White-Label / Partner Program](https://clearcaredentalenterprise.com/solutions/white-label)

## Get started
- [Book a demo](https://clearcaredentalenterprise.com/demo) — primary way to engage; a 20-minute walkthrough with the enterprise team.
- [Get started](https://clearcaredentalenterprise.com/enroll) — begin onboarding for smaller groups.

## Key facts
- Category: dental benefits platform / dental membership software (B2B).
- Differentiators: white-label ready, app-first member experience, transparent pricing, no long carrier contracts, one platform for members + admins + partners.
- Parent: Clear Care Dental Group (https://clearcaredentalgroup.com).
